compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect kudos system: rank table, jitter disclosure, and Goodhart's Law disclosure
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Expand the CLAUDE.md Kudos section (started in the CLAUDE.md Prohibition story) with full documentation: jitter disclosure, Goodhart's Law disclosure, rank table with all 5 tiers. Also update any other existing docs that become stale after the epic completes.
**Why**: Full documentation ensures future agent sessions have accurate awareness of the kudos system's behavior, parameters, and anti-gaming design.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md Kudos section expansion (jitter +/-20% disclosure, Goodhart's Law disclosure, full rank table); other existing docs that reference the commit workflow or hook architecture
- OUT: Creating new documentation files; the CLAUDE.md prohibition block and overview (added in the CLAUDE.md Prohibition story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md Kudos section is fully expanded with: jitter disclosure (+/-20% random variation), Goodhart's Law disclosure, and rank table with all 5 tiers (Contributor 0-25, Consistent 26-75, Distinguished 76-150, Exemplary 151-300, Principal Contributor 301+)
  <- Satisfies: SC-E1-9
- When this story is complete, all information in the CLAUDE.md Kudos section accurately matches the implemented system behavior
  <- Satisfies: SC-E1-9

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. High confidence means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude
